texto: here's the thing about friends, I mean REAL friends: You can't just put up a poster at school and advertise for somebody and then hope you find the perfect one. It might work, I guess, but you'd look so pathetic and desperate that no one would want to be your friend, and so it would be kind of pointless
explicacao: Citação de Laura Preble sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “here's the thing about friends, I mean REAL friends: You can't just put up a poster at school and…” articula reflexao, friends, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
